mentions.note: Luxury apparel conglomerate (Coach, Kate Spade) trading at low-to-mid 20s P/E; positive comparator for Levi's valuation expansion.

Up 84% past 12 months on blowout Q4; magic and logic brand strategy resonating with Gen Z through expressive luxury positioning at Coach and optimistic femininity at Kate Spade; massive TAM upside with <1% global share.
Cramer's field research with 75 high-income teenage girls at 8 schools: all wanted Coach handbag; validates street commentary and company guidance; buy half, add on pullback.
